MSSBam.Name: CFSec
MSSBam.Description: Mark's Code Fractal CFSec - Security Services

SchemaDef.Name: CFSec

Table.Name: Cluster
Table.Label: Cluster
Table.Description: A Cluster is an Mark's Code Fractal installation

Table.Name: ISOCcy
Table.Label: ISO Ccy
Table.Description: ISO Ccy is a global static lookup, replicated to all nodes

Table.Name: ISOCtry
Table.Label: ISO Ctry
Table.Description: ISO Ctry implements the ISO 3166 Codes as a global static lookup, replicated to all nodes

Table.Name: ISOLang
Table.Label: ISO Lang
Table.Description: ISO Lang is a global static lookup, replicated to all nodes

Table.Name: ISOTZone
Table.Label: ISO Timezone
Table.Description: ISO Timezone is a global static lookup, replicated to all nodes

Table.Name: SecSysGrp
Table.Label: System Security Group
Table.Description: System security groups apply to global data and lookups, such as the ISO lookups

Table.Name: SecSysGrpInc
Table.Label: System Security Group Include
Table.Description: System security groups can include other system security groups

Table.Name: SecSysGrpMemb
Table.Label: System Security Group Member
Table.Description: System security group members tie the SecUser to specific system groups

Table.Name: SecClusGrp
Table.Label: Cluster Security Group
Table.Description: Cluster Security groups define permissions at the Cluster level

Table.Name: SecClusGrpInc
Table.Label: Cluster Security Group Include
Table.Description: Cluster security groups can include other cluster or system security groups

Table.Name: SecClusGrpMemb
Table.Label: Cluster Security Group Member
Table.Description: Cluster security group members tie the SecUser to specific cluster groups

Table.Name: SecTentGrp
Table.Label: Tenant Security Group
Table.Description: Tenant Security groups define permissions at the Tenant level

Table.Name: SecTentGrpInc
Table.Label: Tenant Security Group Include
Table.Description: Tenant security groups can include other tenant, cluster or system security groups

Table.Name: SecTentGrpMemb
Table.Label: Tenant Security Group Member
Table.Description: Tenant security group members tie the SecUser to specific tenant groups

Table.Name: SecSession
Table.Label: Security Session
Table.Description: Security sessions are valid throughout the cluster

Table.Name: SecUser
Table.Label: Security User
Table.Description: Login and security information is global amongst the clusters

Table.Name: SecUserPassword
Table.Label: Security User Password
Table.Description: Passwords have special security and are not accessible as normal tables

Table.Name: SecUserPWHistory
Table.Label: Security User Password History
Table.Description: Passwords may not be reused until system configured constraints have been met

Table.Name: SysCluster
Table.Label: Cluster
Table.Description: A Cluster is an Mark's Code Fractal installation

Table.Name: Tenant
Table.Label: Tenant
Table.Description: A Cluster can have any number of Tenants
